reviews.title: Widget support is great
reviews.body: The widget support is fantastic. Home screen widgets work perfectly.
reviews.author: buser1

reviews.title: Decent but crashes sometimes
reviews.body: App crashes occasionally but generally okay. Not as stable as I would like.
reviews.author: buser2

reviews.title: Best dark mode ever
reviews.body: The dark mode implementation is the best I have seen. True OLED black mode available.
reviews.author: buser3

reviews.title: No offline support
reviews.body: Cannot use without internet. Really needs offline mode. Very disappointing.
reviews.author: buser4

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.body: Customer support is very responsive and helpful. Resolved my issue quickly.
reviews.author: buser5
